name: Discriminating shape suite (2026-06-05)
description: Strong discriminating questions for under-covered shapes (anti-join, HAVING, multi-value IN, temporal range, named-entity EN+AR cross-lingual, strip-trap, aggregate+filter). Gold chosen on real data so a wrong shape returns a clearly different number.

Scenarios.Question: which departments have never had a critical outage
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT d.NameEn FROM Departments d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Outages o WHERE o.DepartmentId=d.Id AND o.Severity='Critical')

Scenarios.Question: which regions have more than 12 overdue bills
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) c FROM Bills b JOIN Customers cu ON b.CustomerId=cu.Id JOIN Regions r ON cu.RegionId=r.Id WHERE b.Status='Overdue' GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > 12

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets are open or in progress
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE s.Name IN ('Open','In Progress') AND t.IsDeleted=0

Scenarios.Question: how many bills are paid
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Paid'

Scenarios.Question: how many bills were issued in the first quarter of 2025
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= '2025-01-01' AND IssuedAt < '2025-04-01'

Scenarios.Question: how many outages started in 2025
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE StartedAt >= '2025-01-01' AND StartedAt < '2026-01-01'

Scenarios.Question: what is the average bill amount
what is the largest number of affected customers in any critical outage
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(AffectedCustomerCount) FROM Outages WHERE Severity='Critical'

Scenarios.Question: how many bills belong to customers in Harasta
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills b JOIN Customers c ON b.CustomerId=c.Id JOIN Regions r ON c.RegionId=r.Id WHERE r.NameEn='Harasta'

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد الفواتير لعملاء منطقة حرستا؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills b JOIN Customers c ON b.CustomerId=c.Id JOIN Regions r ON c.RegionId=r.Id WHERE r.NameEn='Harasta'

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر المفتوحة أو قيد التنفيذ؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE s.Name IN ('Open','In Progress') AND t.IsDeleted=0

Scenarios.Question: ما هي المناطق التي لديها أكثر من 12 فاتورة متأخرة؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) c FROM Bills b JOIN Customers cu ON b.CustomerId=cu.Id JOIN Regions r ON cu.RegionId=r.Id WHERE b.Status='Overdue' GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > 12
